TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Roch_Marc_Christian_Kabor√©, title = Roch_Marc_Christian_Kabor√©, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Roch_Marc_Christian_Kabor√©} }

S.FORM: Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© I 1957 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 25 a romi'ad masofoc ci Roch Marc Christian Kabor√©, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Burkina faso anini i ci Roch Marc Christian Kabor√©, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 29 a romi'ad.

S.FORM: Roch Marc Christian Kabor√© I 1957 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 25 a romi'ad masofoc ci Roch Marc Christian Kabor√©, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Burkina faso anini i ci Roch Marc Christian Kabor√©, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 29 a romi'ad.
